title: gonolobus friesii
intro: Gonolobus friesii, also known as Fries' snake flower, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Gonolobus friesii include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as skin conditions, fever, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus friesii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
